on_equip.description: Event to execute when the slot is changed to a non-empty item.

on_unequip.description: Event to execute when the slot is changed to an empty item.

slot.description: The equipment slot to monitor for changes.
slot.title: EquipmentSlot

description: Allows to specify events to execute when equipment is set in the entity's default equipment slots. Doesn't apply to "minecraft:inventory", use "minecraft:equippable" instead.

slots.description: A list of slot-specific events to execute when the entity's equipment changes in those slots.

title: minecraft:on_equipment_changed
